meaning: 新滹[日本本州岛中北岸港市]
examples: Niigata stirred the wood with a poker, and put another log on.
Seventeen years ago I died in Niigata.
Other prefectures such as Niigata also think of merging with their capitals.
However, a similar performance against Denmark could yet mean Niigata is the last port of call for all.
The Niigata pier was teeming with people who had come to see the passengers off.
